lyrics.sanskrit:
अधरं मधुरं वदनं मधुरं नयनं मधुरं हसितं मधुरम् ।
हृदयं मधुरं गमनं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥१॥
lyrics.gujarati:
અધરં મધુરં વદનં મધુરં નયનં મધુરં હસિતં મધુરમ્ ।
હૃદયં મધુરં ગમનં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૧॥
lyrics.english:
Adharam madhuram vadanam madhuram nayanam madhuram hasitam madhuram.
Hridayam madhuram gamanam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (1)

translation.english: His lips, face, eyes and smile are sweet. His heart and gait are sweet; everything about the Lord of sweetness is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
वचनं मधुरं चरितं मधुरं वसनं मधुरं वलितं मधुरम् ।
चलितं मधुरं भ्रमितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥२॥
lyrics.gujarati:
વચનં મધુરં ચરિત્રં મધુરં વસનં મધુરં વલિતં મધુરમ્ ।
ચાલિતં મધુરં ભ્રમિતં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૨॥
lyrics.english:
Vachanam madhuram charitam madhuram vasanam madhuram valitam madhuram.
Chalitam madhuram bhramitam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (2)

translation.english: His speech, actions, attire and movements are sweet. His wandering is sweet; everything about Him is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
वेणुर्मधुरो रेनुर्मधुरः पाणिर्मधुरः पादौ मधुरौ ।
नृत्यं मधुरं सख्यं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥३॥
lyrics.gujarati:
વેણુર્મધુરો રેણુર્મધુરઃ પાણિર્મધુરઃ પાદૌ મધુરૌ ।
નૃત્યં મધુરં સખ્યં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૩॥
lyrics.english:
Venur madhuro renur madhurah panir madhurah padau madhurau.
Nrityam madhuram sakhyam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (3)

translation.english: His flute, dust, hands and feet are sweet. His dance and friendship are sweet; everything about Him is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
गीतं मधुरं पीतं मधुरं भुक्तं मधुरं सुप्तं मधुरम् ।
रूपं मधुरं तिलकं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥४॥
lyrics.gujarati:
ગીતા મધુરં પીતા મધુરં ભુક્તં મધુરં સુપ્તં મધુરમ્ ।
રૂપં મધુરં તિલકં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૪॥
lyrics.english:
Gitam madhuram pitam madhuram bhuktam madhuram suptam madhuram.
Rupam madhuram tilakam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (4)

translation.english: His song, drinking, eating and sleeping are sweet. His form and tilak are sweet; everything about Him is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
करणं मधुरं तरणं मधुरं हरणं मधुरं स्मरणं मधुरम् ।
वमितं मधुरं शमितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥५॥
lyrics.gujarati:
કરણં મધુરં તરણં મધુરં હરણં મધુરં સ્મરણં મધુરમ્ ।
વમિતં મધુરં શમિતં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૫॥
lyrics.english:
Karanam madhuram taranam madhuram haranam madhuram smaranam madhuram.
Vamitam madhuram shamitam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (5)

translation.english: His actions, saving, stealing and remembrance are sweet. His grace and peace are sweet; everything about Him is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
गुञ्जा मधुरा माला मधुरा यमुना मधुरा वीची मधुरा ।
सलिलं मधुरं कमलं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥६॥
lyrics.gujarati:
ગુઞ્જા મધુરા માલા મધુરા યમુના મધુરા વીચી મધુરા ।
સલિલં મધુરં કમલં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૬॥
lyrics.english:
Gunja madhura mala madhura yamuna madhura vichi madhura.
Salilam madhuram kamalam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (6)

translation.english: His garlands, Yamuna, and its waves are sweet. Its water and lotus are sweet; everything about Him is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
गोपी मधुरा लीला मधुरा युक्तं मधुरं भुक्तं मधुरम् ।
दृष्टं मधुरं शिष्टं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥७॥
lyrics.gujarati:
ગોપી મધુરા લીલા મધુરા યુક્તં મધુરં ભુક્તં મધુરમ્ ।
દૃષ્ટં મધુરં શિષ્ટં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૭॥
lyrics.english:
Gopi madhura lila madhura yuktam madhuram bhuktam madhuram.
Drishtam madhuram shishtam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (7)

translation.english: The gopis, His leelas, union and enjoyment are sweet. His vision and conduct are sweet; everything about Him is sweet.

lyrics.sanskrit:
गोपा मधुरा गावो मधुरा यष्टिर्मधुरा सृष्टिर्मधुरा ।
दलितं मधुरं फलितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥८॥
lyrics.gujarati:
ગોપા મધુરા ગાવો મધુરા યષ્ટિર્મધુરા સૃષ્ટિર્મધુરા ।
દલિતં મધુરં ફલિતં મધુરં મધુરાધિપતેરખિલં મધુરમ્ ॥૮॥
lyrics.english:
Gopa madhura gavo madhura yashtir madhura srishtir madhura.
Dalitam madhuram phalitam madhuram madhuradhipater akhilam madhuram. (8)

translation.english: The cowherds, cows, staff and creation are sweet. His actions and their fruits are sweet; everything about Him is sweet.
